moments.title: Wimbledon Quarter-Finals Heating Up
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships continue today with the Quarter-finals, building towards the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals on July 12.

angles.name: Quarter-finals action
angles.copy: Wimbledon Quarter-finals are underway! Who are you backing to make it to the semis? Let's talk tennis.

angles.name: Road to the finals
angles.copy: The grass courts are buzzing! With the finals just days away, every point at Wimbledon counts. Catch all the Quarter-final drama.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Quarter-Finals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 moves into the Quarter-final stage starting July 9, following the conclusion of the Round of 16 today.

angles.name: Quarter-final anticipation
angles.copy: The World Cup just got serious! Quarter-finals kick off this Thursday. Which teams are you tipping to make the semi-finals?

angles.name: Knockout stage intensity
angles.copy: Every game is a final now. The FIFA World Cup Quarter-finals are set to deliver incredible drama. Don't miss a moment!

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days Begin
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale starts its practice days from July 12, ahead of the main tournament play from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf's biggest event
angles.copy: The countdown to The Open is on! Practice days begin this Sunday at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale ready
angles.copy: Golf fans, get ready! The world's best head to Royal Birkdale for The Open practice days, starting this weekend. The course is looking pristine.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues, Highs of 35°C Forecast
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing its third heatwave of the year, with temperatures set to peak at 34-35°C in southern England later this week, and yellow heat health alerts in place until July 11.

angles.name: Stay cool in the heat
angles.copy: Another scorcher! The UK heatwave is here to stay for a few more days with temperatures hitting the mid-30s. Stay hydrated and safe out there!

angles.name: Summer vibes
angles.copy: Sun's out, fun's out! Make the most of this prolonged summer heat, but remember to take precautions. What are your top tips for staying cool?

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86 Today
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, July 7, 2026, continuing his enduring legacy in music.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Beatles legend
angles.copy: From Liverpool to global icon! Celebrating the incredible Ringo Starr on his 86th birthday. His rhythm shaped a generation.

moments.title: Billy Ocean Live at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Global music icon Billy Ocean will headline DEPOT Live at Cardiff Castle on Thursday, July 9, joined by special guest Marti Pellow.

angles.name: Cardiff's summer soundtrack
angles.copy: Get ready to 'Get Outta My Dreams, Get Into My Car'! Billy Ocean brings his timeless hits to Cardiff Castle this Thursday. Who's going?

angles.name: Soul legend in Wales
angles.copy: Billy Ocean and Marti Pellow! What a lineup for Cardiff Castle on Thursday. Expect a night of pure classics and singalongs!

moments.title: Bastille Return to Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum band Bastille will play a huge headline show at Cardiff Castle on Friday, July 10, as part of TK Maxx presents DEPOT Live.

angles.name: Bastille in Cardiff
angles.copy: Bastille are back at Cardiff Castle this Friday! Who remembers their last sell-out show there? Get ready for those arena anthems!

angles.name: Weekend gig guide
angles.copy: Planning your weekend? Bastille hit Cardiff Castle on Friday! Expect a night packed with chart-topping hits. Let us know if you're going!

moments.title: David Gray Plays Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter David Gray is set to perform at Cardiff Castle on Saturday, July 11, bringing his celebrated catalogue to Wales.

angles.name: White Ladder live
angles.copy: David Gray takes to the stage at Cardiff Castle this Saturday! Which 'White Ladder' classic are you hoping to hear?

angles.name: Summer nights in Cardiff
angles.copy: A perfect summer night in Cardiff awaits with David Gray's performance at the Castle on Saturday. Who's joining him?

moments.title: 2000trees Festival Kicks Off in Gloucestershire
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival, a multi-award-winning independent rock and indie festival, takes place in Gloucestershire from July 8-11, 2026.

angles.name: Rock out at 2000trees
angles.copy: Calling all rock and indie fans! 2000trees Festival kicks off tomorrow in Gloucestershire. Who's heading to the fields?

angles.name: Festival season in full swing
angles.copy: The UK festival season is buzzing! 2000trees brings four days of incredible live music starting Wednesday. Get ready to mosh!

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival Returns to Alexandra Palace
moments.blurb: London's Kaleidoscope Festival is back at Alexandra Palace Park on Saturday, July 11, promising a day of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally festival
angles.copy: Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace this Saturday! Music, comedy, and incredible views across London. Who's got tickets?

angles.name: London summer events
angles.copy: Looking for weekend plans in London? Kaleidoscope Festival on Saturday promises a fantastic day out in Alexandra Park!

moments.title: Legally Blonde Prequel 'Elle' Now Streaming
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', which follows Elle Woods' high school years, premiered on Prime Video on July 1.

angles.name: What to watch this week
angles.copy: Bend and snap! The 'Legally Blonde' prequel 'Elle' is out now on Prime Video. Get your fix of high school drama and iconic fashion.

angles.name: New on Prime Video
angles.copy: If you loved Legally Blonde, you need to watch 'Elle' on Prime Video! Dive into Elle Woods' origin story.

moments.title: 'The Five Star Weekend' Debuts on Sky
moments.blurb: The star-studded relationship drama 'The Five Star Weekend', featuring Jennifer Garner, Gemma Chan, and Chloë Sevigny, premieres on Sky and NOW on Thursday, July 9.

angles.name: New drama for your watchlist
angles.copy: Your next binge-watch starts Thursday! 'The Five Star Weekend', with Jennifer Garner and Gemma Chan, premieres on Sky and NOW.

angles.name: Star-studded TV
angles.copy: Jennifer Garner, Gemma Chan, Chloë Sevigny – what a cast! Don't miss the new drama 'The Five Star Weekend' coming to Sky this Thursday.

moments.title: Mavis Staples Celebrates 87th Birthday
moments.blurb: Gospel and soul legend Mavis Staples, known for her work with The Staple Singers and her powerful solo career, turns 87 on July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Soul icon's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the incredible Mavis Staples this Friday! A true icon of soul and gospel music. What's your favourite Mavis track?

angles.name: The voice of a generation
angles.copy: Celebrating the incomparable Mavis Staples on her birthday this Friday. Her voice continues to inspire. Tune in for some of her classics!

moments.title: Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys Turns 72
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead vocalist and keyboardist of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday on July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Pet Shop Boys legend
angles.copy: It's a big birthday for Neil Tennant of the Pet Shop Boys this Friday! The synth-pop pioneer turns 72. What's your top Pet Shop Boys hit?

angles.name: Synth-pop icon
angles.copy: From 'West End Girls' to enduring classics, Neil Tennant's impact on music is undeniable. Happy 72nd Birthday on Friday!

moments.title: Richie Sambora of Bon Jovi Turns 67
moments.blurb: Richie Sambora, the acclaimed guitarist and songwriter for rock legends Bon Jovi, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Rock legend's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Bon Jovi's guitar hero, Richie Sambora, this Saturday! What's your favourite guitar solo from him?

angles.name: Bon Jovi's sound
angles.copy: The man behind so many iconic riffs! Celebrating Richie Sambora's birthday on Saturday. His contributions to Bon Jovi are legendary.

moments.title: Suzanne Vega Celebrates 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Folk-pop icon
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the distinctive voice of Suzanne Vega this Saturday! Which of her songs is your favourite?

angles.name: Storytelling through music
angles.copy: Celebrating Suzanne Vega's birthday on Saturday. Her unique storytelling and timeless tracks continue to captivate.

moments.title: Alessia Cara Turns 30
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning Canadian singer-songwriter Alessia Cara, known for her hit 'Here' and powerful vocals, celebrates her 30th birthday on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Pop star's milestone
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to the incredible Alessia Cara this Saturday! From 'Here' to global stardom, what's your favourite track?

angles.name: Celebrating Alessia
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 30th Birthday to Alessia Cara on Saturday! Her talent and authenticity shine through every song.
